title: Technoblade Pigs
description: This resource pack changes the texture of pigs to have the technoblade crown.
body:
**TECHNOBLADE NEVER DIES**

### This mod changes pigs textures to have Technoblade's crown.
![A pig with a crown on a black background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08fcb90e1510d5c0d74fb705eb21a5230211a5bd_0.webp)
![Pig with crown in the forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3882789e90af9acd05631eb33a9355e7d9670a34_0.webp)


<details>
<summary>Devlog</summary>

### Update 1.0-1.21.3:
- Added new [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/technoblade-pigs)
- Added new [Open-source GitHub Page](https://github.com/ElsMtrn/TechnobladePigs)
- Tweaked Pigs Textures to Have Technoblade's Crown.
</details>
